item.title: Nancy Guthrie's family offering $1 million reward for her whereabouts
item.description: Savannah Guthrie said in a new video that the family is offering an additional reward of up to $1 million for information about their mother Nancy Gut...

item.title: What is the highest gold price in history? Here's how it's changed over the past year.
item.description: Gold shattered records in 2025 and kept climbing. Here's what drove the historic rally and where prices stand now.

item.title: Olympic snowboarder Chloe Kim on competing with an injury and her future in the sport

item.title: D.C. gears up for Trump's State of the Union
item.description: President Trump is set to give the State of the Union address on Tuesday night amid the partial government shutdown. CBS News' Nancy Cordes and Caitli...

item.title: Jeff Probst gives inside look at "Survivor's" 50th season and how fans are influencing the show
item.description: Jeff Probst, who has hosted "Survivor" since it first aired more than 25 years ago, talks with "CBS Mornings" about how the 50th season is different, ...
